title: Hubbell, Inc. (HUBB) CEO Gerben Bakker on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hubbell, Inc. (NYSE:HUBB ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 26, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Daniel Innamorato - Director, IR Gerben Bakker - President, CEO & Chairman William Sperry - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Jeffrey Sprague - Vertical Research Partners Thomas Moll - Stephens Inc. William Vranka - Wolfe Research Joshua Pokrzywinski - Morgan Stanley Christopher Snyder - UBS Christopher Glynn - Oppenheimer Charles Tusa - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Operator Thank you for standing by, and welcome to the second quarter 2022 earnings conference call for Hubbell Corporation. [Operator Instructions].

title: Hubbell (HUBB) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Hubbell (HUBB) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 16.60% and 4.54%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Hubbell: A Pricey Play On Secular Industrial Tailwinds
text: Hubbell's mid-term GDP plus growth target remains intact amid secular tailwinds in automation and electrification. Coupled with margin expansion, there is a clear path to $13/share in EPS power through 2025.

title: 3 High-Yield Infrastructure Stocks to Buy Now
text: Investing in equal parts of these three stocks gives an investor a dividend yield over 4%.

title: Hubbell Incorporated to Announce Second Quarter 2022 Results on July 26, 2022
text: Shelton, CT, July 13, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) today announced it will release its second quarter 2022 financial results prior to the opening of the market on July 26, 2022. The Company will then webcast its Analysts' Conference Call to discuss the results at 10:00 AM ET.

title: Why Hubbell (HUBB) is a Great Dividend Stock Right Now
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Hubbell (HUBB) have what it takes?
